Title: Richardson Twill Back Trucker Cap
LongDescription: The shape and fit of the 312 Solid Twill Trucker is inspired by the best-selling 112 Trucker to create a versatile option that's ready to go wherever the road takes you. In this variation, the classic trucker shape is constructed with a cloth back for versatility and added insulation. KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS ~Same classic fit and feel as the iconic 112 Trucker ~Twill construction presents a refined style with added insulation ~Adjustable snapback ensures an ideal fit for all sizes Product Specifications Style 6 Panel Profile Mid Pro Bill Precurved Sweatband Standard Fabric Cotton-Polyester Twill Composition 60% Cotton/40% Polyester Closure Snapback

Title: Richardson Umpqua Hat
LongDescription: With its mesh flip-up stay, flat bill, lightweight construction, classic Mid Pro crown, and UPF 50+ rating, the 256 offers all the benefits of modern cap design with classic golf vibes for a day on the links and beyond. KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS ~UPF 50+ protects users from even the harshest UV damage ~Striated, woven nylon-cotton blend offers lightweight durability ~Standard cotton sweatband with added vapor barrier reduces sweat diffusion Product Specifications Style 5 Panel Profile Mid Pro Bill Flat Sweatband Standard Fabric Performance Cotton Nylon Composition 85% Cotton, 15% Nylon Closure Snapback

Title: Richardson Macleay Hat
LongDescription: The Macleay Trail leads hikers from the pavement of NW Portland to an old-growth PNW forest in less than a quarter of a mile. In honor of its namesake, the 217 Macleay is designed to traverse that cross-current of nature and urbanity. A lightweight twill, UPF 50+ protection, and modern five-panel construction make this camper cap an outdoor favorite. KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS ~UPF 50+ protects from even the harshest UV damage ~Five-panel camper style fits in on the street and the trail ~Adjustable nylon woven backstrap creates a comfortable fit Product Specifications Style 5 Panel Profile Relaxed Bill Flat Sweatband Standard Fabric -Colors Cotton-Polyester Twill -Camo Cotton Spandex Twill Composition -Colors 60% Cotton/40% Polyester -Camo 97% Cotton/3% Spandex Closure Nylon Woven Backstrap

Title: Richardson Corduroy Hat
LongDescription: Located nearly 6,000 feet above sea level on the south face of Mt. Hood, Timberline Lodge stands as one of Oregon's most famous historical landmarks. The 253 honors the history of the lodge, featuring a warm and stylish corduroy exterior and cotton twill lining to keep your head warm when mountain winds blow. A bill rope adds personality, while UPF 50+ protects you from the sun's harsh rays. KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS ~UPF 50+ protects users from even the harshest UV damage ~Corduroy exterior is warm, soft, and uniquely stylish ~Bill rope provides a classic cap accent Product Specifications Style 6 Panel Profile Hi Pro Bill Flat Sweatband Cotton Fabric Cotton Corduroy Composition 100% Cotton Closure Snapback

Title: Richardson Canvas Duck Cloth Cap
LongDescription: Across hard terrain and harsh weather, the 309 was made to withstand the toughest of conditions. Cut from super durable duck cloth canvas, it's always ready for the next challenge. Earth-tone colorways deliver a rugged look, and an adjustable hook-and-loop backstrap makes for a secure and comfortable fit. KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS ~Duck cloth canvas holds up under the toughest conditions ~Adjustable hook-and-loop backstrap firmly holds its size ~A precurved bill delivers a consistent, athletic look Product Specifications Style 6 Panel Profile Low Pro Bill Precurved Sweatband Standard Fabric Cotton Canvas Composition 100% Cotton Closure Hook-and-Loop Backstrap

Title: Richardson Ashland Hat
LongDescription: At 7,532 feet, Mount Ashland is the highest peak in the Siskiyou Mountains of Southern Oregon and the namesake for the 254RE, a relaxed unstructured cap that delivers a casual, clean look from the mountains to the sea. Made from 100% Global Recycled Standard Certified recycled polyester, this cap is a responsible headwear choice that delivers timeless style in all situations. PRODUCT FEATURES ~Crafted with 100% recycled polyester for reduced environmental impact ~Adjustable cloth hideaway backstrap makes it easy to find the perfect fit ~Relaxed unstructured profile delivers classic style Product Specifications Style 6 Panel Profile Relaxed Bill Precurved Sweatband Standard Fabric Recycled Polyester Twill Composition 100% Recycled Polyester Closure Cloth Hideaway Backstrap

Title: Richardson Twill R-flex Hat
LongDescription: On the field, in the dugout, or cheering from the bleachers, the 185 is a versatile baseball cap made for any occasion. Its six-panel, Mid Pro crown offers classic ballcap style, while R-Flex stretch makes for simple sizing. KEY FEATURES & BENEFITS ~R-Flex technology stretches for simpler sizing and an ideal fit ~Comfort Stretch sweatband improves fit and delivers all-day comfort ~Find the right fit with three available sizes Product Specifications Style 6 Panel Profile Mid Pro Bill Precurved Sweatband Comfort Stretch Fabric Stretch Cotton Polyester Composition 62% Cotton, 36% Polyester, 2% Spandex Fit R-Flex Size XS-SM SM-MD LG-XL
